# frontend-logger

A simple and fast logging module for Node.js applications.

> [!WARNING]
> **⚠️ Deprecated**
>
> Please migrate to `@meli/logger`. Follow the [migration guide](https://nordic.adminml.com/docs/migration-guides/modules/logger/migrate-to-meli-logger).

> [!NOTE]
> `logger.verbose` and `logger.silly` are mapped to `trace` level internally. They will appear as `trace` in your logs.
